item.title: Data Recovery for Mobile Phone [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Data Recovery for Mobile Phone [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverydigcam
item.itunes:summary:
Data Recovery for Mobile Phone
(Utilities)
Innovative software Data Recovery for Mobile Phone is fully capable to undelete completely removed data files from handheld devices without need of any expert guidance or technical assistance. Cell Phones Data Recovery program is integrated with advance technology and empowers people to regain wallpapers from mobile phone memory in time efficient manner.

[read more]

item.title: recordmydesktop gui [Screen Recorders]

item.itunes:author: Upgreyed
item.itunes:summary:
recordmydesktop gui
(Screen Recorders)
A graphical frontend for recordmydesktop.
Works with most X11 desktop environments.
Does not work with Wayland.

item.title: XD Card Files Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: XD Card Files Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restorefiles
item.itunes:summary:
XD Card Files Restore
(Utilities)
www.pdd.mobi present data reviving application that useful for retrieve user data that delete from phone memory card due to virus attack. How to rescue lost images from portable storage device via XD Card Files Restore software? Easy to use file restoring program is used to regain missing document and data from your compact flash, SD card.

item.title: Photos Recovery Utility [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Photos Recovery Utility [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecovery-1
item.itunes:summary:
Photos Recovery Utility
(Utilities)
Now you easily restore all formatted pictures, snaps wallpapers, images from pen drive using technically advance Photos Recovery Utility. Secure photo rescue application is able to revive photo album, snapshots saved in different graphical formats like jpg, gif, tiff, exif, png, bmp etc. Picture recovery program uses inbuilt disk scanning feature to retrieve deleted wallpapers, screenshots, photographs from accidently crashed IDE device within few seconds.

[read more]

item.title: Camera Photo Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Camera Photo Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverydigcam
item.itunes:summary:
Camera Photo Recovery
(Utilities)
Advance Camera Photo Recovery Software quickly restore erased, misplace vital images, birthday photograph from inaccessible digital camera memory card. Photo Recovery application gets back digital photograph, pictures, audio and video file in simple manner. Digital Camera Data Recovery Software effectively regains misplaced picture graphic files and folders in simplified manner. Camera Photo Recovery utility specially designed to retrieve damaged photos anniversary recording video from hard disk drive. Comprehensive Digital Camera Data Recovery program revive lost all important audio video clipping, image file due to formatted dive, worm attack, human error. Easy to install digital photo revival program recover erased crucial family images, photos from damaged memory card within given time periods. Digital Camera Photo Recovery program get back mistakenly deleted birthday photograph, pictures in few seconds. Effective Camera Data Recovery Software securely revives entire damage, deleted formatted images audio and video files in simple mouse clicks. Camera Photo Recovery program restores damage, missing image and supports all windows based operating system like Windows 11,Win 10,Win 8,Win 7. Company delivers www.data-recovery-digital-camera.com web site to rescue formatted precious photographs, snaps, videos from damage digital camera device in cost effective manner. Features: * Camera Photo Recovery software successfully retrieves deleted significant images, photograph from damage digital camera device. * Image Recovery application revives mislaid picture video file due to human fault, formatted disk many other. * Versatile Digital Camera Data Recovery Software get back misplaced video file, wedding photograph from storage media. * Camera Photo Recovery application quickly get back file, pictures and support all brands of digital camera like Kodak, Panasonic, Nikon, Sony, Toshiba etc.

[read more]

item.title: ToolsBaer EML to G Suite Importer [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: ToolsBaer EML to G Suite Importer [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: michaelgeorge
item.itunes:summary:
ToolsBaer EML to G Suite Importer
(Utilities)
ToolsBaer EML to G Suite Importer is a user-friendly solution that allows Usre to export EML files to a G Suite account while saving data. Users can convert EML files to G Suite accounts more easily with the help of this program. With the EML to G Suite Importer program, managing EML files of any size or quality is simple. One of the greatest tools makes it simple to import EML files into the G Suite account of your choosing without requiring you to install any additional software. Even non-technical users will find the tool easy to use because of its simple structure. This was thought of at the time of creation. Every email that successfully attachments an EML file to a G Suite account is 100% accurate. The conversion processes are finished by the EML to G Suite Converter without affecting any data. The program exports all email conversation data, including email, attachments, hyperlinks, CC, BCC, To, and From. Converting several EML files into G Suite at once is most reliably done using this technique. The program works with Windows 11, 10, 8, 8.1, 7, XP, Vista, and all earlier iterations of the operating system. The EML to G Suite Importer utility is currently available for free download.

[read more]

item.itunes:author: datarecovery-1
item.itunes:summary:
Flash Drive Files Recovery
(Utilities)
Are you looking for cost effective data recovery software? You must try Flash Drive Files Recovery application offered by company at www.flashdrivedatarecovery.net with free demo to restore lost or missing data files and folders easily without taking any expert guidance. Effective usb flash drive recovery software regains corrupted images, pictures, music files and other multimedia files easily within few clicks.

item.title: USB Sim Card Reader [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: USB Sim Card Reader [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restorefiles
item.itunes:summary:
USB Sim Card Reader
(Utilities)
Dekart sim card reader provides quick and easy solution for recovering the all lost and corrupted sms, contact name and numbers. USB sim card information backup device gives the full backup of your deleted data items and restore them into the sim card memory. Contact reader software recovers missing or misplaced data from your sim card. Sim card sms recovery application can rescue read and unread inbox, outbox text messages including with message sender name and number. SIM card mobile express card reader also recoup all details of call like dialed calls, missed calls and received call information. Sim card message backup machine revives your mislaid data taking minimum time without affecting any previously saved data items. Data processing tool is non-destructive and read only software that supports all major types of sim card readers like LG-SIMCR-001, Micro SD/T-F Card, GF-CR05, ESR4618, GF-SCB-601, ACR38T, ACT30, ACR38DT Dual Key smart card, USB2.0 All-In-1 Card, 3.5", 5.25" Internal Card, T-flash and Imono USB 2.0 SD SIM card readers. Program supports all types of card reader, seller, maker, manufacturer, hardware. It salvages your important data when your sim is not locked and does not require any pin code or authorization code.Features:* Application recovers your sms messages that are not readable in your mobile phone.* Provides the printing facility that prints the entire recovered item.* Sim card SMS reader tool fetches the data that is accidently erased.* Software can easily rescue your erased information using the card reader and personal computer.* Program revives your data from every type of sim cards that belongs from any country or network.* It is non-destructive and read only utility that easily operate on all versions of windows operating system.* Software examines the contents stored in the sim card like contact name, numbers, sms.

[read more]

USB Sim Card Reader

item.title: Data Recovery Android [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Data Recovery Android [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverydigcam
item.itunes:summary:
Data Recovery Android
(Utilities)
Download Data Recovery Android Software from www.data-recovery-digital-camera.com website to successfully get back formatted or misplaced precious digital data. Data Recovery Android software has capability to regains lost music file, text file save in any file format like jpeg, bitmap, tiff, giff and, mov, txt etc. Have you deleted your precious file and folders from android data storage device, without delay download user friendly Android Data Recovery software to retrieve all lost data in original format.

[read more]
